actionUnits.condition: Validate MonoBehaviour mapping and serialized settings for Fire.cs, and note absence of UnityEvents to call. MonoBehaviour component fileID 2592690533154406537 uses m_Script guid 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d (Fire). Serialized fields: debug=0, isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, timeToOn=3 (will be re-randomized 40–60 in Awake), timeToOnDelta=0, shouldTurnOn=0, onNeighbors=0, maxNeighborDistance=4 (Prefab mod shows 3.5 but scene MonoBehaviour lists 4), downMultiplier=2, downNeighborDist=0.5, maxHitInterval=2, currentHitInterval=0, totalHitTime=5, currentHitTime=0, neighbors=[], onNeighborsThreshold=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3, mainEffectGo fileID 1849464941111748095. BoxCollider present (no Rigidbody). There are no m_Calls/UnityEvents on this component and Fire exposes no public parameterless methods (public methods are WaterHit(Vector3), SetIsOn(bool), NotifyNeighborState(bool), FindNeighbors(Fire[],int), UpdateFireState(bool)), so no direct callable Trigger methods are available. This step asserts configuration only; functional event triggering (e.g., WaterHit or neighbor-based ignition) requires additional objects/info.
